label: MEDDPICC
description: B2B SaaS qualification framework. Demo instance of the swappable gap-scan framework — not hardcoded into pipeline logic.

dimensions.label: Metrics
dimensions.description: Quantified business impact / ROI the buyer expects.

dimensions.label: Economic Buyer
dimensions.description: The person with final budget authority; whether they were identified and directly engaged.

dimensions.label: Decision Criteria
dimensions.description: The formal/informal criteria the buying committee will judge vendors against.

dimensions.label: Decision Process
dimensions.description: Steps and approvals required to reach a signed contract.

dimensions.label: Paper Process
dimensions.description: Procurement, legal, and security review steps required before signature.

dimensions.label: Identify Pain
dimensions.description: The business pain driving urgency to buy.

dimensions.label: Champion
dimensions.description: An internal advocate with influence who actively sells on the vendor's behalf.

dimensions.label: Competition
dimensions.description: Known competing vendors or the status-quo/build-it-ourselves alternative.
